event_comments:
The Lost & Found box is overflowing; coats, water bottles, folding chair. Please check that you have all your belongings from the event. Please label your stuff.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
cumulative_event_comments: Lost and Found: We have several coats and other items that were left behind at the end of the event. Please email info@cascadeoc.org to claim your belonging. PLEASE label your stuff with your name.
